start.text: Engagement confirmed. Billing timer starts now.
Per section three of our agreement, combat pay is now in effect.
Noting for the record: they escalated first.
Deploying. Collateral is billed at cost, plus handling.
Time to leverage some core competencies.

start_boss.text: This one looks dangerous. Escalating to enterprise pricing.
Flagging this one as a hazard surcharge.

retreat.text: Withdrawing. My last employer taught me to recognize a restructuring.

victory.text: Wrapping up. Itemized invoice to follow.
Victory confirmed. Salvage is in escrow until it's inventoried.
Humbled and grateful to announce a successful engagement.
Grateful to everyone who made this explosion possible.
This will make a strong TriLink post. 'What today's ambush taught me about teamwork.'

victory_boss.text: Kill confirmed. I'll let Red do the speech.
Adding 'capital ship removal' to my skills section. Endorsements welcome.

pursuing.text: They're running. Standard rates still apply.
Pursuing. Their exit strategy is poor.
Following up, per my last transmission.

running.text: Disengaging. Martyrdom is out of my scope.
Too many. Filing this under unacceptable risk exposure.
Open to new opportunities. Effective immediately.

need_help.text: I need backup. It's a time-sensitive action item.
Looking to connect with anyone in the immediate area.

out_of_missiles.text: Racks empty. Noting the shortfall in the log.
Out of missiles. Procurement will be hearing about this.

engaged.text: Target acquired. Beginning the off-boarding process.
Your profile caught my eye. Unfortunately.

hull_50.text: Hull at half. Adjusting my risk tolerance.
Taking real damage. This engagement is underperforming.
Treating this as a growth opportunity.

hull_30.text: Hull critical. Someone will be hearing from legal.
Critical damage... I hate this job.
This is becoming a story about resilience.

death.text: Frame's a write-off... it was fully depreciated anyway...
Recover the black box... it has the receipts...
